title: Finding
description: A discrete issue, risk, or anomaly detected by an agent.

agent.description: The identifier of the agent producing the finding (e.g., 'C', 'D').

severity.description: The risk level of the finding.

evidence.description: Mandatory dictionary of key-value pairs supporting the finding.

recommended_action.description: The suggested next step for this specific issue.

open_questions.description: Questions for human reviewers if the agent is uncertain.

recommendations.description: Additional context or suggestions beyond the primary action.
